meta.title: MithasHQ - The Operating System for Sweet Shops
meta.description: Manage inventory, production, customer ledgers, payments, and demand forecasting with MithasHQ. The complete ERP for sweet shops, dairy businesses, and namkeen manufacturers.

hero.badge: Trusted by 500+ Sweet Shops & Dairy Businesses
hero.headline: Run Your Entire Sweet Shop From One Dashboard
hero.subheadline: Manage inventory, production, customer ledgers, payments, and demand forecasting with MithasHQ. Built for Indian sweet shops, dairy businesses, and namkeen manufacturers.

problem.title: Still Running Your Shop on WhatsApp & Notebooks?
problem.subtitle: Most sweet shops still rely on outdated tools. Here's what goes wrong:

stockouts.title: Stockouts & Wastage
stockouts.description: No idea what you have in stock. Milk spoils. Sweets expire. Money goes down the drain.

payments.title: Missed Payments
payments.description: Customers owe money but you can't track it. Bad debts pile up. Cash flow suffers.

production.title: Production Blindness
production.description: Making too much or too little every day. No correlation between demand and production.

intelligence.title: Zero Business Intelligence
intelligence.description: No clue which product is most profitable. Decisions are based on gut feeling, not data.

howItWorks.title: How MithasHQ Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Three simple steps to transform your shop

1.title: Manage Inventory
1.description: Log stock-in and stock-out in seconds. Get low-stock alerts before you run out. Track expiry dates automatically.

2.title: Track Production
2.description: Plan your daily batches. Track actual vs planned production. Reduce waste and improve efficiency.

3.title: Grow Profitability
3.description: See who owes you, what's selling, and what to produce tomorrow. Make data-driven decisions.

features.title: Everything You Need to Run Your Shop
features.subtitle: One platform. All your operations. Zero complexity.

inventory.title: Inventory Management
inventory.description: Real-time stock tracking with expiry alerts and reorder notifications.

production.title: Production Tracking
production.description: Plan batches, track inputs & outputs, and calculate production costs.

ledger.title: Customer Ledger
ledger.description: B2B wholesale tracking with outstanding balance and credit limit monitoring.

payments.title: Payment Tracking
payments.description: Cash, UPI, Bank Transfer, Cheque — all recorded in one place.

reports.title: Outstanding Reports
reports.description: One-click reports on who owes what. Filter by customer, shop, or date range.

forecasting.title: Demand Forecasting
forecasting.description: AI-powered predictions for festivals, weekdays, and seasonal trends.

ai.title: AI Business Assistant
ai.description: Ask questions. Get answers. What should I produce tomorrow? Who owes the most?

multishop.title: Multi-Shop Management
multishop.description: One dashboard for all your locations. Compare performance across shops.

trust.title: Your Data is Safe With Us

security.title: Data Security
security.description: 256-bit encryption, SSL everywhere. Your data is encrypted in transit and at rest.

access.title: Role-Based Access
access.description: Owner, Manager, Accountant, Staff — each sees only what they need.

backup.title: Cloud Backups
backup.description: Automatic daily backups. Never lose your data, even if your phone breaks.

isolation.title: Multi-Tenant Isolation
isolation.description: Your data is completely separate from every other shop. No data leakage, ever.

pricing.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Scale when you're ready.

free.name: Starter
free.description: Perfect for small shops just getting started

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: For growing businesses with multiple locations

enterprise.name: Enterprise
enterprise.description: For large chains and franchise operations

pricing.note: All plans include a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.

data.question: Is my data safe?
data.answer: Yes. Your data is encrypted with 256-bit AES encryption, stored in isolated tenant databases, and backed up daily. We never share or sell your data.

mobile.question: Can I use it on mobile?
mobile.answer: Absolutely. MithasHQ is a fully responsive Progressive Web App (PWA). Use it on your phone, tablet, or desktop — it works beautifully everywhere.

multishop.question: What if I have multiple shops?
multishop.answer: The Growth plan supports up to 3 shops. The Enterprise plan supports unlimited shops. You can switch between shops instantly from one dashboard.

ai.question: How does the AI assistant work?
ai.answer: Our AI reads your business data (inventory, sales, payments) and answers questions like 'What should I produce tomorrow?' or 'Which customer owes the most?' It never shares your data externally.

cancel.question: Can I cancel anytime?
cancel.answer: Yes. No lock-in. No cancellation fees. Export your data anytime before leaving.

trial.question: Is there a free trial?
trial.answer: Yes, every plan includes a 14-day full-feature trial. No credit card required. You can also try our demo mode with synthetic data instantly.

finalCta.title: Start Managing Your Sweet Shop Smarter
finalCta.subtitle: Join 500+ sweet shops already using MithasHQ
finalCta.note: No credit card required. Try demo mode instantly.

footer.tagline: The Operating System for Sweet Shops

demo.description: Experience MithasHQ with realistic demo data. No signup required.
